title: integrity-inputs v1.0.0
description: Canonical HashInput names and one-line serialization specs for interlock's IntegrityHasher. Each entry names one input to the integrity hash; layers implement the HashInput protocol against this list.

owner.description: Layer repo that implements this HashInput.

serialization.description: One-line spec for how the value is serialised to bytes before hashing.

status.description: pinned = spec locked; tbd = graduation condition stated in README.md.

pinned_entries.name: pattern_table
pinned_entries.serialization: Sorted-keys JSON of the pattern registry, UTF-8 encoded.

pinned_entries.name: model_digest
pinned_entries.serialization: Raw model manifest bytes as returned by the Ollama API manifest endpoint.
